summary: Stripe webhook data must be verified, idempotent, and low-noise before it changes billing state.
invariants: Webhook requests must verify Stripe-Signature with STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET before processing event data.
The webhook route must ignore unrelated event types after recording a minimal ignored receipt.
The webhook route must use Stripe event ids as idempotency keys and avoid storing raw webhook bodies.
Only latest Stripe customer and subscription object data should be stored for billing reconciliation.
Payment method details, card numbers, webhook secrets, and Stripe API secrets must never be stored in policy JSON or application tables.
